chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 854 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (Priority) 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of CMA No.746/2025 (S/A) 3. For hearing of main case 23-09-2025 Mr. Abdul Mujeeb Shaikh, Advocate for the Petitioner Syed Naveed Ahmed Shah, Deputy Attorney General >>>>>..<<<<< Counsel for the Petitioner, under instructions, does not press instant Constitution Petition. Accordingly, the same is dismissed as not pressed along with listed application. Judge Judge ARBROHI/PS
